sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21807" key="gelowmili/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γελοωμῐλία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n21807.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fellowship in laughing,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.573</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammian.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
